economic_notes: George Gordon Developments Limited Partnership accounted for by modified equity method; TLE Holdings Ltd. and TLE Revenue Account consolidated; Gordon Retail Centre consolidated; Treaty Benefits Claim initiated against Government of Canada; COVID-19 impacts noted including office closures and travel restrictions
notes: Fiscal year 2022 (year ended March 31, 2022). Province is Saskatchewan (Treaty 4 Territory). 6 entities consolidated including CMHC Housing, Gordon Retail Centre, Off-Reserve Advisory Board Inc., GHawk Enterprises Ltd., TLE Revenue Account, and TLE Holdings Ltd. George Gordon Developments Limited Partnership accounted for by modified equity method (1 GBE). George Gordon TLE Trust - Principal Trust Account excluded from consolidation as Chief and Council do not control it. Treaty Benefits Claim (contingent asset) initiated against Government of Canada; $464,131 loan drawn to fund costs. Emphasis of Matter paragraph in auditor's report regarding Treaty Benefits Claim loan. Education expenses combined Education ($5,443,833) + Post Secondary ($1,810,575) = $7,254,408. total_government_transfers includes ISC ($20,184,502) + CMHC ($394,112) = $20,578,614. OSR = $29,228,202 - $20,578,614 = $8,649,588.
